commands.hypothesis: v15 = same path-shape signal (sum_abs_returns_0_30) as the v14 cohort, but with a +5..+90 entry gate (vs v14's wider gate). Hypothesis: tightening the entry window would surface lower-noise entries and improve net SOL accumulation. Direct 1:1 A/B vs v14 — same filter, only the entry gate differs.

prediction.kill_criterion: underperforms v14 on net SOL accumulation

commands.note: KILLED 2026-05-10. v15-sumabs-shadow and v15-sumabs-dd-shadow both finished at median -1.51%, timeout-dominated exits, no net SOL accumulation. Direct 1:1 vs v14 (same path-shape filter, no +5..+90 entry gate): v15 underperformed v14, so the narrower entry gate is not pulling weight on this signal. v14 cohort kept to continue collecting. Lesson: +5..+90 entry gate + sum_abs_returns_0_30 path-shape filter does not outperform the wider-gate equivalent.
